entries.reason: The diff is broad in documentation count but narrow in product behavior: it adds one CLI memory guard, advisory attribution metadata, a judgment-axis precision precondition, and PR artifact traceability. Tests and design-ssot evidence are focused on these shared seams, so splitting would duplicate the same evidence and make the audit-window contract harder to review.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.
